name: Granite Bay School for Boys
description:
Granite Bay School for Boys is a reform school.

All members of the faculty are women.

All the students are male.

Student ages: 18-40.

Student Punishments: Spanking (bare bottom), enforced nudity & CBT [cock and ball torture] (for the worst offences only). Both are performed in front of the student's fellow classmates, regardless of their location. and the students

School nurse: gives all injections into the ass, all medicine is given via suppositories.

School Nurse tools: Colonoscopes (a camera tube inserted up the rectum into the colon), Cystoscopes (a thin tube with a camera and light on the end inserted into the urethra), Dilators (used to open up the urethra to make examination easier), Anoscope (used to spread the anus to make examination easier), rectal thermometer.

School Nurse examinations: Prostate exam, basic shots (e.g. flu), testicle examination, penile examination.

Disciplinary tools (Spanking): Rulers, canes, paddles, whips.

Disciplinary tools (CBT): Clamps, tasers, pins, thumbtacks.

Disciplinary tools (Other): Pin-chair (a char with pins on the seat).
